name: Communicate with Customer
description:
Send a message to the human customer. This is the ONLY way orchestrators communicate with humans - all output must go through this tool.

Message types:
- status: Brief progress update (non-blocking)
- question: Need input from customer (blocks until answered)
- notification: Deliverable ready or milestone reached (non-blocking)
- error: Something failed or needs attention (may block depending on severity)

Orchestrators must end every turn with either this tool or delegate.

message.description: The message content (keep brief: 1-3 sentences for status/notification, clear question for questions)

context.description: Additional context. For questions: why this input is needed. For errors: what was attempted.

implications.description: What choosing this option would lead to

options.description: For questions: structured choices to present

default_option.description: For questions with options: recommended choice if customer doesn't respond

artifacts.description: For notifications: artifact references being presented (e.g., 'workspace:section:chapter_1_draft')

severity.description: For errors: severity level. 'error' severity may block for customer decision.

delivered.description: Whether the message was delivered to the customer

selected_option.description: For questions with options: which option was selected

answer.description: For questions: the customer's free-form response

response.description: For questions: the customer's response (if synchronous)

input.message: Starting story structure planning. Delegating to Plotwright.
What tone would you like for this story?
input.context: The tone will affect word choice, pacing, and themes throughout.

input.message: Chapter 1 draft is ready for your review.
